_note: release/39 canonical Switchboard on-demand MAINNET feed map. adrena_feed_id range 142..255 reserved for Switchboard (see adrena/programs/adrena/src/state/pool.rs OracleProvider::feed_id_range). Crypto block 142-147 mirrors ChaosLabs (0-5) order: SOL, jitoSOL, BTC, WBTC, BONK, USDC. All six slots are now Adrena-owned feeds on the mainnet on-demand queue. Slots 142 (SOLUSD) and 145 (WBTCUSD) were migrated 2026-04-19 from borrowed public-queue feeds to Adrena-owned definitions pinned via providers-testing/service/src/build-mainnet-feeds.ts (source JSON under providers-testing/service/config/solusd_mainnet.json and wbtcusd_mainnet.json). Queue A43DyUGA7s8eXPxqEjJY6EBu1KKbNgfxF8h17VAHn13w is the on-demand mainnet default.

switchboard_feed_map._source_jobs: providers-testing/service/config/solusd_mainnet.json — medianTask over Kraken solusd + Coinbase Exchange SOL-USD + Coinbase retail SOL-USD, minSuccessfulRequired=2, maxRangePercent=1.5. Mirrors the proven public BTC/USD Redesigned Price Feed (45bd1d1...) shape.

providers-testing/service/config/wbtcusd_mainnet.json — medianTask over Coinbase retail WBTC-USD + Binance WBTC/USDT*Coinbase USDT/USD + MEXC WBTC/USDT*Coinbase USDT/USD, minSuccessfulRequired=2, maxRangePercent=1.5. Coinbase Exchange WBTC-USD is delisted and Bitstamp is empty; Jupiter swap leg prototyped but wormhole WBTC doesn't route through whitelisted AMMs in the Crossbar simulator.
